original_image_tags: Aged, slightly stained paper document with two punch holes at the top. Contains typed letter from J. Edgar Hoover, various handwritten annotations in blue, red, and black ink, and official stamps.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned typewritten FBI letter dated November 1, 1947, signed “John Edgar Hoover, Director,” with handwritten and stamped annotations, including a red “COMMUNICATIONS SECTION MAILED 4” stamp at the bottom and file markings across the page.*
